eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Castro, TX; at 12:38 PM ON MAY 15, 2026 Effective until 01:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Castro County Emergency Management: A fire warning has been issued for this area. There is a dangerous wildfire located 9 miles northwest of Happy. Avoid FM 168 north of county line. Detour FM 1075. Do not drive around barricades.
